race.description: Happy Anniversary Sonny & Rhonda Cadman Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: MARINE GIRL (6) kept fresh for this after being thrown in the deep end with a fading eleventh over 1000m at Randwick in a solid rating Highway contest on February 28. Assess on the good win here three-starts back. Will find this more to her liking. DENMAN FORCE (9) progressive gelding ready to win third-up. Gripped on late from the wide barrier with a sound third over 950m at Cowra. Holds a forward position and has genuine winning claims. WONDER STEP (1) durable gelding resuming with a solid record over this course and distance. Fitted with the two strong trials and must be kept safe with the claim. STORMY SWEY (10) was readied with a trial and has won at the distance so keep safe fresh.
